notes: Dry run found official Coca-Cola IR transcript links for every target quarter. The primary source is the official financial information page, which lists Transcript links by quarter. Most 2022-2024 PDF assets opened directly in the research tool; several 2025-2026 direct PDF assets returned a JavaScript verification page during direct inspection, so they are marked link_label_only and should be verified in the next pass.
